sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62313" key="leiyose/lhnon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειψο-σέληνον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n62313.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the moon's first</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">last quarter</tr_>, when it is hidden, Paraphr.Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
